activeIngredients: Water (Aqua), Glycerin, Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide 20 Amide, Citrus Reticulata (Tangerine) Extract, Polygonum Multiflorum (Fo-Ti) Root Extract, Sesame Indicum (Sesame) Seed Extract, Biotin, Zanthoxylum Bungeanum Fruit Extract, Panax Ginseng Root Extract, Humulus Lupulus (Hops) Flower Extract, Panthenol, Glycine Soja (Soybean) Germ Extract, Hydrolyzed Barley Protein, Wasabia Japonica Leaf Extract, Caffeine, Coffea Arabica (Coffee) Seed Extract, 1,2-Hexanediol, Butylene Glycol, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Acetyl Tyrosine, Pentylene Glycol, Gluconolactone, Sodium Benzoate
features: ONLY PATENTED ANTI-GREY HAIR SCALP SERUM FOR WOMEN & MEN — Clinically backed grey hair serum, powered by Mela-9 Complex to help slow early greying, preserve natural pigment, and support thicker, denser hair in 3–6 months with consistent daily use.
HAIR GROWTH & THICKENING SERUM — Formulated with patented antioxidants and peptide technology to nourish follicles, improve scalp health, and promote stronger, thicker, fuller hair.

LIGHTWEIGHT, OIL-FREE FORMULA — Dermatologist-tested, hypoallergenic scalp serum is non-greasy, fast-absorbing, and suitable for all hair types, including fine, oily, or color-treated hair. Provides weightless volume at the roots without buildup.

EASY DAILY ROUTINE — Apply 6–10 pumps directly to the scalp 1-2X daily. Massage in and style as usual. For maximum results, pair with Arey’s Not Today, Grey supplement for complete inside out care targeting both greying and thinning hair.

CLEAN, PREMIUM QUALITY FORMULATION — Formulated in the USA, and dermatologist-tested. Vegan, gluten-free, cruelty-free, scent-free and color-safe. Backed by clinical research for safety and efficacy, designed for consistent daily use.
productBenefit: Our proactive and clean topical serum is formulated to reduce the signs of aging hair while promoting healthier, more voluminous hair.
safetyWarning: Arey works best on those who have 0-30% grey hair.
shortDescription: To The Root™ utilizes our patent-pending, science-backed combination of antioxidants and a clinically-efficacious peptide to slow and re-pigment grey hair while also delivering thicker, fuller, healthier hair- with the added benefit of panthenol for increased volume.
specialFeatures: Patented Mela-9 Complex for grey hair reduction, Clean, Hypoallergenic, Oil-Free Formula for all hair types
title: Arey To The Root Hair Serum for Women & Men | Slows Grey Hair Growth & Preserves Pigment in 3–6 Months | Anti Grey Scalp Serum for Healthier, Fuller-Looking Hair | Vegan & Oil-Free Formula (1 Month)
